zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Innes於1532年出生在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安時，她的父親Donald Innes of Lochbroom30歲，母親Lady Marion Ogilvy22歲。她於1544年與Donald de Ross在英國蘇格蘭羅斯 安德 可洛馬迪結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1571年在蘇格蘭洛-爾巴爾布萊爾享年39歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Innes于1532年出生在苏格兰米德洛迪安时，她的父亲Donald Innes of Lochbroom30岁，母亲Lady Marion Ogilvy22岁。她于1544年与Donald de Ross在英国苏格兰羅斯 安德 可洛馬迪结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1571年在苏格兰洛-爾巴爾布萊爾享年39岁。

nameMeanings.name: Innes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: shortened form of McInnis , from Gaelic Mag Aonghuis ‘son of Aonghus’.
Scottish: habitational name from the barony of Innes in Urquhart (Morayshire), named from Gaelic inis ‘island’.

variants.name: Ince
meanings: habitational name from Ince in Makerfield (Lancashire), Ince (Cheshire), or Ince Blundell (Lancashire). The placenames derive from Proto-Welsh ïnïs ‘island’.

possibly a post-medieval West Midlands variant of Hints, a habitational name from either of two places called Hints (Staffordshire, Shropshire). The placenames probably derive from Proto-Welsh hïnt ‘way, path’ + Middle English plural -es.

possibly a variant with plural or post-medieval excrescent -s of Inn, from residence at an inn or inns, from Middle English in (singular) or innes (plural) ‘tavern, lodging(s), tenement(s)’. There seems also to have been some confusion with Scottish Innes .

variants.name: Inch
meanings: English: perhaps, at least in some cases, a variant of   Ince  .

variants.name: McInnis
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Aonghuis, a patronymic from the personal name Aonghus (see Angus ). See also McInnes , compare Irish McGinnis .

variants.name: Inness
meanings: Scottish (Durham and Northumberland): variant of   Innes  .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Innes was born in 1532, in Midlothian, Scotland, her father, Donald Innes of Lochbroom, was 30 and her mother, Lady Marion Ogilvy, was 22. She married Donald de Ross in 1544, in Ross and Cromarty, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1571, in Balblair, Ross-shire, Scotland, at the age of 39.

fr.Balblair, Ross and Cromarty, Scotland, U: Balblair, Ross and Cromarty, Écosse, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Innes est née en 1532, à Midlothian, Écosse, son père, Donald Innes of Lochbroom, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Lady Marion Ogilvy, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Donald de Ross en 1544, à Ross and Cromarty, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1571, à Balblair, Ross-shire, Écosse, à l’âge de 39 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Innes 1532 in Midlothian, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Donald Innes of Lochbroom 30 und ihre Mutter Lady Marion Ogilvy 22. Sie hat 1544 in Ross and Cromarty, Schottland, United Kingdom Donald de Ross geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1571 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Balblair, Ross-shire, Scotland.

ko.Balblair, Ross and Cromarty, Scotland, U: 영국 스코틀랜드 로스 앤드 크로마티 바블레이르
ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Innes(이)가 1532년 스컷랜드 미들로스이언에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Donald Innes of Lochbroom(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Marion Ogilvy(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1544년 영국 스코틀랜드 로스 앤드 크로마티에서 Donald de Ross(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1571년 스컷랜드 로스-실르 바블레이르에서 39세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Donald de Ross em 1544, em Ross and Cromarty, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. ru.Balblair, Ross and Cromarty, Scotland, U: балблеир, росс анд кромерти, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Innes родилась в 1532 г. в местности мидлотян, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Donald Innes of Lochbroom было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Marion Ogilvy, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Donald de Ross в 1544 г. в местности росс анд кромерти, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1571 г. в местности балблеир, росс-шир, Шотландия в возрасте 39 лет.
